narrative:
Elk Township has 2,004 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.7 percentage points.
